accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and accurate WPR context (60-day clock, 30-day extension, May 1 deadline).

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; contextual references to the WPR and cited statutes are correct.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill directs removal of U.S. forces from unauthorized hostilities within or against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The resolution directs presidential action under existing WPR procedures rather than amending or repealing statute.

exceptions_conditions.why: Summary fully captures the rule-of-construction carve-outs (defense, intelligence, assistance to Israel, evacuation) and the authorization exception.

effective_dates.why: Summary notes the March 2, 2026 notification, Feb 28 initiation, May 1, 2026 deadline, and 30-day extension timing.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the operative removal directive, findings, expedited-procedure basis, and rule of construction.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, descriptive language with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent, tracking the bill's structure.

concise.why: Compact with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the War Powers Resolution, the cited statutes, sponsors' subject matter, and Israel.

correct_figures.why: All figures (60 days, 30-day extension, March 2 and Feb 28 2026, May 1 2026) match the bill text.
